allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add complete project scaffolding with manifest.json and placeholder files

This commit establishes the full project structure for the JobLink Chrome extension:

- manifest.json: MV3 configuration with permissions for storage, identity \(OAuth\),
  sidePanel, activeTab, and scripting. Includes OAuth2 config for Google Drive
  \(drive.file scope\) and content script matches for LinkedIn/Indeed.

- background/service-worker.js: placeholder for install events and OAuth management
- content-scripts/linkedin.js: placeholder for LinkedIn job scraping
- content-scripts/indeed.js: placeholder for Indeed job scraping
- sidepanel/: placeholder HTML, CSS, and JS for the job review interface
- setup/: placeholder HTML, CSS, and JS for first-run configuration wizard
- drive/drive-api.js: placeholder for all Google Drive REST API calls
- utils/helpers.js: placeholder for shared utilities and storage key constants
- assets/icons/: minimal placeholder PNG icons \(16, 48, 128px\)

All placeholder files contain a single descriptive comment explaining their purpose.
The extension can be loaded in Chrome Developer Mode for structural verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add session log

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(Description" heading → full description body → footer.:*)
